title: Fix release workflow precondition heredoc indentation
rawUserRequest: 继续推进发布前障碍清理；发现流程问题先停止发布并修正根因，完成完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程后再发布 v0.5.39。

declaredIntent.summary: 修复发布 workflow 的内嵌 Python 前置条件缩进错误，并在重新发布前完成完整工单闭环。

intent.problem: The first formal v0.5.39 release attempt failed before any tag or Release mutation because the release workflow's embedded Python precondition had an unexpected indentation.
constraints: Keep release publication paused until this Work Item completes its full PR and closure lifecycle.
Do not create a budget-only Work Item; reserve the single required archive record in this functional correction.
intent.rationale: Correct the workflow at its root and add regression coverage so the same precondition syntax failure is caught before another release attempt.

outOfScope: Creating or publishing a GitHub Release
Creating a separate budget-only Work Item

sources.reason: The failed release precondition is implemented here.
Defines governed release and Work Item terminology.

problemStatement: The v0.5.39 dispatch failed with IndentationError in the release workflow's heredoc Python precondition. No publication mutation occurred, but the workflow defect must be corrected before retrying release.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Release workflow embedded precondition is syntactically valid and aligned
Release publication remains out of scope until this lifecycle closes
evidence: Contract outOfScope and PR lifecycle record

riskAssessment.reason: A workflow syntax defect can block publication; the change is narrow, explicitly scoped, and covered by focused regression tests.

executionDecision.reason: The root cause, scope, acceptance, and verification are explicit; publication itself is intentionally deferred.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the embedded Python precondition is parsed by the same shell/heredoc structure used in CI.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Preserve scope and verification evidence through the corrective lifecycle.

acceptance: The release workflow embedded Python precondition has valid indentation and executes as intended.
A regression test detects malformed indentation or misaligned precondition assertions before PR.
The measured archive-growth reservation is raised from 525 to 526 within this functional Work Item and recorded for later repayment.
The Work Item completes Finish, archive, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, and default-branch synchronization before release retry.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized root process correction before retrying publication.

repaymentRecords: release_workflow_precondition_indent_fix|archiveGrowth|525|526|user|2026-07-24|Reserve the single workflow precondition correction archive required after the release workflow indentation failure; repay during final plan cleanup.
budgetImpact.reason: Reserve the functional correction archive and measured governance ceiling in the same Work Item.

rollbackNote: Revert the workflow and regression changes together; do not alter immutable prior release evidence.
